summary: ANDROID | FMD - When app open for first time dialog for 'Data collection' is constantly appearing after clicking on device card
scenario: Data collection dialog repeatedly appears after dismissing it and clicking a device card on first app launch with location denied
description_clean: When the app is opened for the first time, the 'Data collection' dialog keeps appearing repeatedly after clicking on a device card. Steps: 1) Start app with a device connected. 2) During onboarding, select 'Don't Allow' for location. 3) Go to FMD screen and click OK. 4) Dismiss the second dialog by tapping outside. 5) Click on a device card without exiting the screen. Observed: The dialog pops up constantly. Expected: The dialog should be dismissed and the device card should open correctly.
steps: Start app with a device connected.
During onboarding, select 'Don't Allow' for location.
Go to FMD screen and click OK.
Dismiss the second dialog by tapping outside.
Click on a device card without exiting the screen.
expected: The dialog should be dismissed and the device card should open correctly.
